Event: Titanic Excavation - Feb 2025
Event Date: 26/02/2025
Sage Bot Item Code: A200
Eternal Satellite

Triggers: Once in a while

Thunder Strike
A lightning bolt strikes a random enemy and applies an electric pulse for 5 sec. Whenever a unit affected y the electrical pulse uses an ability, they are struck by a lightning discharge that deals 128000 magic damage to that unit and all enemies in a small radius around them.
Also, all affected units are stunned for 1 sec. Additionally, the primary target of the ability has their physical and magic armor reduced by 20% for 4 sec and takes 192000 magic damage for 4 sec.

When any unit on the battlefield dies, an artifact's ability's lightning bolt strikes a random enemy out of turn and applies an electric pulse for 5 sec.

Requirements: 90-100
